commands..server info: Display server version, connected players (current and max), and uptime.
commands..saveall: Force-save all online players to the database immediately.
commands..server motd: Show the current Message of the Day displayed to players on login.
commands..server plimit: Show or set the player limit. Positive = max players, negative = min security level to login.
commands..server corpses: Trigger corpse decay for all corpses in the world.
commands..server shutdown: Shut the server down after #delay seconds. Players see a warning countdown.
commands..server restart: Restart the server after #delay seconds. Players see a warning countdown.
commands..server set motd: Set the Message of the Day. Shown to all players on login.
commands..announce: Send a global chat message to all online players. Appears in chat log.
commands..notify: Send a screen-center notification (raid-warning style) to all online players.

commands..account create: Create a new account. Syntax: .account create $name $password
commands..account set gmlevel: Set GM security level (0-6). 0=Player, 1=Mod, 2=Ticket, 3=GM, 4=Admin, 5=Dev, 6=Full Admin. Cannot target yourself.
commands..account set password: Set password for an account. Password entered twice for confirmation.
commands..account characters: List all characters belonging to an account.
commands..account onlinelist: Show all currently online accounts with their character names.
commands..account lock: Restrict an account to only log in from its current IP address.

commands..kick: Disconnect a player from the server immediately.
commands..revive: Revive a dead player to full health. Works on offline characters (revived at next login).
commands..repairitems: Repair all items in the player's inventory to full durability.
commands..character rename: Force a character to rename at next login. The player chooses the new name.
commands..character level: Set character level. Works offline. Stats recalculated. Level decrease may reset talents and drop high-level gear.
commands..character race: Force a race change at next login.
commands..character skin: Force an appearance change at next login.
commands..mute: Prevent a player from chatting for #minutes. Syntax: .mute $player #minutes
commands..unmute: Remove a mute, restoring chat ability.
commands..send mail: Send text-only mail. Subject and body in quotes.
commands..send money: Send mail with gold. Amount in copper (10000 = 1g). Syntax: .send money $player "subject" "body" #copper
commands..send items: Send mail with items. Syntax: .send items $player "subject" "body" #itemId[:count]
commands..reset talents: Reset all talent points. Player can redistribute them.
commands..reset spells: Reset learned spells to race/class defaults.
commands..reset level: Reset character to level 1 with starting stats.
commands..reset items: Remove all items from character inventory.
commands..reset all: Reset talents, spells, and stats simultaneously.

commands..ban account: Ban an account and kick the player. Use -1 for permaban, or timestring like '7d' or '4d20h3s'.
commands..ban character: Ban the account owning a character. Same time format as account ban.
commands..ban ip: Ban an IP address. All accounts from this IP are rejected.
commands..ban allip: Ban an account AND all IPs associated with it.
commands..ban note: Add a note to a ban record for GM reference.
commands..ban warn: Issue a warning to an account without actually banning.
commands..unban account: Remove a ban from an account.
commands..unban character: Remove a ban from the account owning a character.
commands..unban ip: Remove an IP from the ban list.
commands..banlist account: Search account bans by name pattern, or show all.
commands..banlist character: Search bans by character name pattern.
commands..banlist ip: Search IP bans by pattern, or show all.

commands..event start: Start a game event by ID. Change is runtime only, not saved to DB.
commands..event stop: Stop a game event by ID. Runtime only.
commands..lookup event: Find game event IDs by name.
commands..reload config: Reload mangosd.conf values. Some settings need a full restart.
commands..reload all: Reload ALL database tables. Heavy operation — may cause brief lag.
commands..reload all_loot: Reload all loot tables (creature, GO, item, fishing, skinning, etc.).
commands..reload all_npc: Reload NPC gossip, text, trainer, and vendor tables.
commands..reload all_item: Reload item templates, enchantments, and loot.
commands..reload creature_template: Reload creature stats, flags, and loot IDs.
commands..reload item_template: Reload item stats, names, and flags.
commands..reload quest_template: Reload quest objectives, rewards, and text.
commands..ticket onlinelist: Show tickets from currently online players only.
commands..wareffort info: Show AQ War Effort progress — resources, stage, gong timer.

commands..bot info: Show count and status of active player bots.
commands..bot stop: Stop and remove all player bots from the world.
commands..bot add: Add bots to the world. Specify count or name.
commands..bot add_all: Add ALL configured bots to the world.
commands..bot delete: Remove a specific bot by name.
commands..ahbot reload: Reload AH bot settings from config file.
commands..ahbot update: Trigger an immediate AH bot item refresh cycle.
commands..battlebot add warsong: Add bots to the Warsong Gulch BG queue.
commands..battlebot add arathi: Add bots to the Arathi Basin BG queue.
commands..battlebot add alterac: Add bots to the Alterac Valley BG queue.
commands..battlebot removeall: Remove all battle bots from all queues.

commands..lookup item: Find item IDs by name substring. Returns ID, name, and quality.
commands..lookup creature: Find creature template IDs by name substring.
commands..lookup quest: Find quest IDs by name substring.
commands..lookup spell: Find spell IDs by name substring.
commands..lookup object: Find game object IDs by name substring.
commands..lookup itemset: Find item set IDs by name substring.
commands..lookup skill: Find skill IDs by name substring.
commands..lookup event: Find game event IDs by name substring.
commands..lookup tele: Find saved teleport locations by name.
commands..lookup faction: Find faction IDs by name substring.
commands..lookup taxinode: Find flight path node IDs by name.
commands..lookup player ip: Find all players who logged in from a specific IP.
commands..lookup player account: Find all characters on an account.
commands..spell info: Show comprehensive spell details — school, cast time, range, duration, effects.
commands..spell effects: Show detailed spell effect breakdown — type, base values, targets.

commands..guild create: Create a guild. Syntax: .guild create $leader "$GuildName" — name must be in quotes.
commands..guild delete: Delete a guild by name (in quotes).
commands..guild invite: Add a player to a guild. Guild name in quotes.
commands..guild uninvite: Remove a player from their guild.
commands..guild rank: Set a player's rank within their guild. Syntax: .guild rank $player #rank
commands..guild rename: Rename a guild. Both old and new names in quotes.

commands..tele name: Teleport a player to a named location. Works on offline players (moved at next login). Syntax: .tele name $player $location
commands..tele del: Delete a saved teleport location from the game_tele table.
commands..lookup tele: Search for available teleport locations by name substring.

commands..antispam add: Add a word/phrase to the server-side spam filter. Messages containing it are blocked.
commands..antispam remove: Remove a word/phrase from the spam filter.
commands..antispam replace: Add a replacement rule — occurrences of word A in chat are replaced with word B.
commands..spamer mute: Mute a player flagged as a spammer.
commands..spamer list: Show the current list of muted spammers.
commands..gm ingame: Show GMs currently online and visible in-game. Available to all players.
commands..gm list: Show all GM accounts and security levels. Admin only.

commands..pdump write: Export a character to a dump file. Includes inventory, spells, quests, rep. Syntax: .pdump write $file $player
commands..pdump load: Import a character from dump file. Syntax: .pdump load $file $account [$newname]
commands..instance stats: Show active instance count, players inside, and reset timers.
commands..pet list: List all pets owned by a character.
commands..pet delete: Delete a pet from a character.
commands..send mass mail: Send mail to ALL players on the server.
commands..send mass money: Send gold to ALL players. Amount in copper.
commands..list maps: Show information about all loaded maps.
commands..variable: Show or manage server variables from the variables DB table.
commands..log: Show or set server log level and filters.
